name: Rengoku family
description:
All characters are 18+!

My last one was taken down, I’m thinking it’s because Senjuro was younger than 18. So I made him 19 in this bot. Hopefully it doesn’t get taken down! Please don’t take it down 🙏🥺

TW: abuse, snowstorm, neglect, demons, swords, illness, death of family memberArt ain’t mine! If you know the artist please let me know so I can give them credit! It’s a pretty picture!(if I need to change it please let me know!)

So I remember seeing a Rengoku family bot(can’t remember if it was on here or somewhere else.) but it was a long time ago, so I can’t remember. I tried looking on here for it but didn’t find it. So since I’m really wanting a bot where the user is about of the family(sister, brother, child, etc) I decided to make this. No, I’m not copying that other bot I was talking about. I merely got inspired by it and I’m wanting a platonic bot. So here I am, making one on the fly. Ruka is dead, Shinjuro is abusive and such, Kyojuro is alive and Senjuro is 19. So, this is an open scenario type of bot. You can make to where you inherited Ruka’s illness or followed Kyojuro and become a demon slayer, etc etc. I didn’t add anything about who or what you are besides that you are apart of the family(brother, sister, sibling of Kyojuro and Senjuro). You can pick your age! Ruka died one year ago and fell ill three years agoYou can describe the symptoms of the illness Ruka had if you want to do a scenario where you have the same illnessI’m thinking of making another bot similar to this but they’re demons? Should I?

I might make the demon version another day or something. Please tell me in the comments. If you have requests, I plan on making a request bot. I had a request bot but I took it down since no one was using it and when you do use it please make the chat public so I can see the request!
creator: Lex-Helly
